infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Citizen Monitor uses your camera so you can capture election evidence and submit incident reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Citizen Monitor uses your photo library so you can attach election evidence from your gallery.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Citizen Monitor uses your location to verify that reports and evidence are submitted from the correct polling area.

plugins.photosPermission: Citizen Monitor accesses your photos so you can attach election evidence from your gallery.
plugins.cameraPermission: Citizen Monitor accesses your camera so you can capture live election evidence.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Citizen Monitor uses your location to verify that reports are submitted from the correct polling area.
